title: On Holding Q3 2023 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: On Holding (ONON) delivered Q3 2023 results that surpassed analyst estimates on both earnings and revenue metrics. The company reported earnings of $0.22 per share versus consensus expectations of $0.16. Revenue exceeded expectations with over CHF 480 million in net sales, representing 47% year-over-year growth or 58% on a constant currency basis. The quarter marked On's seventh consecutive record quarter. Gross profit margin reached 59.9%, the highest since the company's IPO. Adjusted EBITDA of CHF 81.3 million was a record that exceeded any prior quarter by nearly 30%. Management raised full-year guidance to CHF 1.79 billion from CHF 1.76 billion, reflecting confidence in sustained momentum through year-end.
